category_sources: source_facts.description says Action-RPG game engine; official docs at https://docs.solarus-games.org/ describe Solarus as a free open-source game engine for 2D games.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is solarus; official website https://www.solarus-games.org/ and documentation use Solarus capitalization.
docs_sources: Official Solarus documentation domain provides tutorials, Lua API reference, migration guide, file specifications, and resources.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://gitlab.com/solarus-games/solarus, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an Action-RPG game engine; official docs describe a 2D game engine with Lua API, tutorials, and game file specifications.
